title: Block Components Connection Rule
description: Defines whether other blocks such as fences, walls, bars, and glass panes are allowed to connect to this block.

accepts_connections_from.title: Connection Type
accepts_connections_from.description: The type of block allowed to connect to this block. Note that the "only_fences" option allows connections from all Vanilla fences excluding NetherBrick.

enabled_directions.title: Enabled Directions
enabled_directions.description: The cardinal directions that connection is enabled for. Note that if "none" is specified for "accepts_connections_from", this field will not be used.
